message:
chore(beads): sync .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue status

Routine state-of-the-world sync via `br sync --flush-only`. Exports
whatever status transitions, priority changes, and new/closed issues
have accumulated in `.beads/beads.db` since the last flush, keeping
the JSONL source of truth aligned with the committed docs updates
for the 37-tool / 25-resource / 16-screen state of the project.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
